subject: Step 2.6 — Wang iterative refinement
description: Implement TRU-FACT rounds 2+ on top of Step 2.5: rebuild each cell's soma-print using the n nearest already-matched anchors (CZ side) and their matched HCR counterparts (HCR side), re-score, re-mutual-best, iterate. Compare to Step 2.5 single-round numbers.
